After 24 hours working with the Unknown skill, here's what makes it essential for your workflow.

## What It Does



## Key Features

• Displaying games, visualizations, dashboards
• Showing generated HTML content
• Interactive demos
• Watches the root directory for changes (via chokidar)
• Injects a WebSocket client into HTML files

```bash
┌─────────────────┐     ┌──────────────────┐     ┌─────────────┐
│  Canvas Host    │────▶│   Node Bridge    │────▶│  Node App   │
│  (HTTP Server)  │     │  (TCP Server)    │     │ (Mac/iOS/   │
│  Port 18793     │     │  Port 18790      │     │  Android)   │
└─────────────────┘     └──────────────────┘     └─────────────┘
```

📋 OpenClaw Trello Skill Deep Dive

After 24 hours working with the trello skill, here's what makes it essential for your workflow.

## What It Does

Manage Trello boards, lists, and cards via the Trello REST API.

## Key Features

• Board/List/Card IDs can be found in the Trello URL or via the list commands
• The API key and token provide full access to your Trello account - keep them secret!
• Rate limits: 300 requests per 10 seconds per API key; 100 requests per 10 seconds per token; `/1/members` endpoints are limited to 100 requests per 900 seconds

```bash
   export TRELLO_API_KEY="your-api-key"
   export TRELLO_TOKEN="your-token"
   ```

## Usage

All commands use curl to hit the Trello REST API.

### List boards

```

🎮 5 Pro Tips for OpenClaw Discord

After 100+ hours using this skill:

1. Always: `channel: "discord"`.
2. Respect gating: `channels.discord.actions.*` (some default off: `roles`, `moderation`, `presence`, `channels`).
3. Prefer explicit ids: `guildId`, `channelId`, `messageId`, `userId`.
4. Multi-account: optional `accountId`.
5. Avoid Markdown tables in outbound Discord messages.

**Bonus Tip:**
Combine discord with other skills for 10x productivity:
- coding-agent: Automate code generation
- github: Auto-create PRs
- notion: Log results automatically

**The Result:**
Work that used to take hours now takes minutes.

GitHub: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/tree/main/skills/discord

What's your favorite OpenClaw tip? Share below! 👇

#OpenClaw #Tips #discord
